title: Assistant Store Manager - Tanishq - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Tanishq - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tanishq! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Allahabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tanishq:
Tanishq is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tanishq!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
